title: dryopteris omeiensis
intro: Dryopteris omeiensis, also known as Omei fern or the Chinese royal fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris omeiensis include its ability to reduce fever, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use, or dried and used as an ingredient in traditional Chinese herbal remedies.
